title: Bank-financed M&A in India: A new era under RBI’s Amendment Directions
description: For decades, Indian acquisition financing has relied on promoter equity, offshore leverage, or bespoke workarounds. In February 2026, the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) issued the RBI (Commercial Banks – Credit Facilities) Amendment Directions, 2026 (CF Amendment Directions), and the RBI (Commercial Banks – Concentration Risk Management) Amendment Directions, 2026 (CRM Amendment Directions), (collectively, Amendment Directions). The Amendment Directions permit Indian commercial banks to extend
